findings.evidence: `rg` shows the only new geometry file is `TauCeti/Geometry/Symplectic/TotallyReal.lean`; lines 1, 25, and 59 show `import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.Projection`, `def standardComplexStructure`, and `def IsTotallyReal`, all depending only on `Submodule`, `LinearMap`, and `IsCompl`.
findings.fix: Move the file to an earlier linear-algebra home, e.g. `TauCeti/LinearAlgebra/TotallyReal.lean` (or split the doubled-module complex-structure API there), and let future symplectic/analytic files import it.
findings.issue: This module defines only submodule/linear-endomorphism API (`LinearMap.standardComplexStructure`, `IsTotallyReal`, product and image lemmas) while importing only `Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.Projection`; nothing in the file uses symplectic forms or geometry-specific structure.

summary: The new material is pure linear algebra but is introduced under `Geometry/Symplectic`, so the canonical placement is too late and too topic-specific for its dependencies and API surface.
